_description: Design tokens for dark-mode-theme pattern. All values are used in after/styles.css. Contrast ratios are calculated against #1a1a1a (primary background) unless noted.

primary.usage: Main background color for dark mode

primary.note: Off-white on #1a1a1a = 12.63:1 (AAA). No wcag field — validator checks against white; this token is only used on dark backgrounds.

secondary.note: On #1a1a1a = 5.74:1 (AA). No wcag field — validator checks against white; this token is only used on dark backgrounds.

fail-example-primary.usage: Shown in before/ — do not use for text
fail-example-primary.note: Medium gray looks 'light enough' but fails dramatically.

fail-example-secondary.usage: Shown in before/ — do not use for text
fail-example-secondary.note: Even darker gray — still fails by a wide margin.

fail-example-border.usage: Shown in before/ — do not use for borders or component backgrounds
fail-example-border.note: On #1a1a1a = 1.20:1 (FAIL for non-text contrast). No wcag field — this color passes on white but fails on dark backgrounds where it is actually used.

background.note: Dark enough to look like a component, light enough to be visible.

background-hover.note: Hover states must also meet contrast requirements.

text.usage: White text on interactive element backgrounds
text.note: White on #374151 = 10.76:1 (AAA). No wcag field — validator checks against white (1:1); this token is only meaningful against its dark button background.

ring.usage: Focus ring outline color — 2px solid, 2px offset. Meets WCAG 2.4.11 (3:1 minimum for focus indicators).
